title: fimbristylis sellowiana
intro: Fimbristylis sellowiana, also known as Sellow's fimbry, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fimbristylis sellowiana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and managing fever. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in some traditional remedies, such as salves and creams, to treat various health conditions.
